content: TASK-042 interrupt done: corrected TASK-041's over-aggressive area packing. Boundary/subgraph boxes are no longer pushed outside zone boxes; zone remains the outer physical region, while same-kind area boxes can still be separated. Regression now asserts boundary/subgraph containment inside zones for combined overlays and after abstraction collapse. Next: continue TASK-009/TASK-010 acceptance work; consider 3D full icon-grid parity and subgraph overlay parity in 3D if the human asks. Keep TASK-011 QIF audit active and run full pattern verification only for routing/overlay/verifier changes or periodic audit.
